name: chatgpt-image-2
description: Generate images with ChatGPT Image 2 (GPT Image 2 / ChatGPT Images 2.0) inside Claude Code, using your existing ChatGPT Plus or Pro subscription — no separate OpenAI access, no per-image billing. Supports text-to-image, image-to-image editing, style transfer, and multi-reference composition via the local Codex CLI. Triggers on "chatgpt image 2", "gpt image 2", "gpt-image-2", "ChatGPT Images 2.0", "image 2", or any explicit ask to generate or edit an image through the user's ChatGPT plan.
